allow: Bash(sshpass -p raspberry rsync -a --delete --exclude='__pycache__' -e "ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no" packages/partyboxd/src/partyboxd/ pi@partybox.local:/tmp/partyboxd_new)

Bash(sshpass -p raspberry ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no pi@partybox.local "sudo mv /tmp/partyboxd_new /opt/partybox-companion/lib/python3.14/site-packages/partyboxd && sudo systemctl restart companion")
Bash(sshpass -p raspberry ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no pi@partybox.local "curl -s http://localhost/api/v1/health | jq '.speaker_state'")
Bash(sshpass -p raspberry ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no pi@partybox.local "curl -s http://localhost/api/v1/health | grep speaker_state")
